title: Claude Plans, Gemini Designs: The Workflow to Build BEAUTIFUL Frontends
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates a multi-model coding workflow where Claude Opus handles planning and reasoning while Gemini 3.5 Flash specializes in frontend design. The approach leverages each model's comparative advantages to build full-stack applications with improved speed and output quality.
